method: Per-instrument ROC AUC with bootstrap CIs (10000 resamples)

caveats.integration: Includes both received (Class 1) and earned (PC-INT) positives. The earned/received distinction is the conjunction's job.
caveats.self_engagement: PC-SE tested via direct instrument invocation (Option 3). Battery trajectory precondition bypassed.
caveats.transfer: Single true positive (3E). Small sample — AUC=1.0 is a consequence of strict separation, not strong statistical power.
caveats.trajectory: STDP as sole architecturally-grounded positive. HEB excluded (variable results).
caveats.battery_level: No battery-level (conjunction) ROC computed. Gate F is the first test of conjunction discrimination.
